title: Bacterial fluorescent in situ hybridization (FISH) in Ephydatia muelleri
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fu01n","text":"This protocol is used to visualize bacteria in and around gemmule-hatched freshwater sponges using a Eubacteria FISH probe. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"a9ad9","text":"Work with formaldehyde and formamide (also present in Hybridization Buffer) in a chemical fume hood and dispose of waste appropriately.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text:
{"blocks":[{"key":"8feo8","text":"Freshwater sponge gemmules.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dsmva","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"31mat","text":"35 mm coverslip-bottom dishes with a 10 mm inner well diameter (Mattek #P35G-0-10-C). Note: you can use a different coverslip thickness, but the diameter of the inner well works with the volumes suggested in this protocol.
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4fqa9","text":"Fixative [4% formaldehyde (F8775-25ML Millepore) in 95% reagent alcohol].
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9d1pn","text":"PBS-Tw [1x PBS (41620012 bioPLUS) containing 0.1% Tween-20 (P1379-500ML Sigma-Aldrich)].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9b0ls","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a4bpd","text":"Formamide, Deionized (0606-950mL Amresco).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aqjj4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cjql9","text":"SSC (S24022-1000.0 RPI).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"563b8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eqhjm","text":"Eub338 probe (Amann et al., 1995. Microbiological reviews.).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":26,"length":2},{"style":"italic","offset":34,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6qa5f","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"62vb5","text":"Hybridization Buffer (Found in Molecular Instruments HCR‱ buffers pack in the HCR‱ RNA-FISH bundle).
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":56,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":81,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"lhqq","text":"Hoechst 33342 stock solution [10mg/mL] (40046 Biotium).
","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2cej8","text":"Mounting medium [either Vectashield (H-1000 Vector Laboratories) or equivalent].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8gnlb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b7da8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"D35D6319665311EFA7340A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"CA60B511665311EFA8850A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
steps: Add 3-4 mL mL of spring water to a 35mm coverslip bottom dish and place 1-3 gemmules into the center of the inner well.
Let grow in the dark (to reduce autofluorescence of algae) at Room temperature for about 168:00:00 (1 week) or until tissue appears developed.
Make fixative of 4% formaldehyde in 95% EtOH 150 µL, per sample Do not breathe in fumes from formaldehyde, handle this chemical in a fume hood.

Remove water from the outer well area, add 150 µL of fixative to the sponge, and let sit at room temperature for 04:00:00 When pipetting from the wells, do so slowly from the outer well to not disturb sponge tissue. Also pipette slowly when adding solutions to the inner well.

Closer to the end of the incubation, prepare a 0.1% solution of Tween-20 in 1X PBS (now referred to as PBS-Tw) 12 mL, per sample Prepare 10% formamide in 2X SSC 2 mL, per sample Do not breathe in fumes from formamide, handle this chemical in a fume hood.
Remove the PBS-Tw and repeat the wash two more times
Remove the fixative from the outer well area and replace with 4 mL of PBS-Tw to each well
Add 2 mL of freshly prepared 10% formamide in 2X SSC to each sample and incubate at 37 °C for 02:00:00

Prepare 1:100 eub338 probe [1µM final concentration] in Hybridization Buffer (Molecular Instruments) and heat to 37℃ After this point, keep samples out of the light to protect the conjugated FITC probe
Remove the 10% formamide in 2X SSC from the samples and add 80-100 µL of probe mixture to the inner well, being careful to leave the samples flat
Place lid on sample and leave in humid chamber Overnight at 37℃ It may be helpful to place damp KimWipes in between samples in a Tupperware container to keep the samples from drying out

Prepare 10% formamide in 2X SSC 3 mL, per sample Prepare 2X SSC 3 mL, per sample Prepare 0.2X SSC 12 mL, per sample Warm all solutions to 37 °C in a water bath Do not breathe in fumes from formamide, handle this chemical in a fume hood.
Remove probe mixture from samples and add 3 mL of pre-warmed 10% formamide in 2X SSC. Incubate for 00:10:00 at 37 °C
Remove the 10% formamide in 2X SSC from the wells and replace with 3 mL of pre-warmed 2X SSC. Incubate for 00:10:00 at 37 °C
Remove the 2X SSC from the wells and replace with 3 mL of pre-warmed 0.2X SSC. Incubate for 00:15:00 at 37 °C
Repeat step 15 two more times, for a total of three washes
Prepare a 1:200 dilution of Hoechst (stock concentration of 10mg/mL) in 0.2X SSC 100 µL, per sample
Remove 0.2X SSC from wells and add about 100 µL of Hoechst solution to each inner well. Incubate for 00:15:00 at Room temperature
Wash samples with 3mL of 0.2X SSC
Remove wash and add mounting medium
Samples are ready to be imaged, or can be left in the dark at 4 °C for preferably up to a week
creator: Haley Womack
